title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAMBAT, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO LUMANGBAYAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 741 / 43 OG No. 7, 2908 (July, 1947)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 189, June 22, 1947 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAMBAT, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO LUMANGBAYAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Sambat, in the municipality of Rosario, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to Lumangbayan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 22, 1947.
